\[ ecause a\equiv b\pmod{m}\] \[ herefore m\mid a-b\] \[ herefore \exists p\in \mathbb{Z}:a-b=pm\] \[同理\exists q\in \mathbb{Z}:b-c=qm\] \[两式相加得a-c=(p+q)m\] \[ herefore m|a-c\] \[ herefore a\equiv c\pmod{m}\]

定理10

内容

\[若a,b,c\in \mathbb{Z},m>0,a\equiv b\pmod{m}\] \[则 egin{cases}a+c\equiv b+c\pmod{m}\a-c\equiv b-c\pmod{m}\ac\equiv bc\pmod{m}\end{cases}\] ### 证明 1. \(a+c\equiv b+c\pmod{m}\)

\[ ecause a\equiv b\pmod{m}\] \[ herefore m\mid a-b\] \[ herefore m\mid (a+c)-(b+c)\] \[ herefore a+c\equiv b+c\pmod{m}\] 2. \(a-c\equiv b-c\pmod{m}\)

\[ ecause a\equiv b\pmod{m}\] \[ herefore m\mid a-b\] \[ herefore m\mid (a-c)-(b-c)\] \[ herefore a-c\equiv b-c\pmod{m}\] 3. \(ac\equiv bc\pmod{m}\)

\[ ecause a\equiv b\pmod{m}\] \[ herefore m\mid a-b\] \[ herefore m\mid c(a-b)\] \[ herefore m\mid ac-bc\] \[ herefore ac\equiv bc\pmod{m}\]

定理11

内容

\[a,b,c,d,m\in \mathbb{Z},m>0\] \[若a\equiv b\pmod{m},c\equiv d\pmod{m}\] \[则 egin{cases}a+c\equiv b+d\pmod{m}\a-c\equiv b-d\pmod{m}\ac\equiv bd\pmod{m}\end{cases}\] ### 证明 1. \(a+c\equiv b+d\pmod{m}\)

\[ ecause a\equiv b\pmod{m}\] \[ herefore\exists p\in \mathbb{Z}:a-b=pm\] \[同理\exists q\in \mathbb{Z}:c-d=qm\] \[两式相加得(a+c)-(b+d)=(p+q)m\] \[ herefore a+c\equiv b+d\pmod{m}\] 2. \(a-c\equiv b-d\pmod{m}\)

\[ ecause a\equiv b\pmod{m}\] \[ herefore\exists p\in \mathbb{Z}:a-b=pm\] \[同理\exists q\in \mathbb{Z}:c-d=qm\] \[两式相减得(a-c)-(b-d)=(p-q)m\] \[ herefore a-c\equiv b-d\pmod{m}\] 3. \(ac\equiv bd\pmod{m}\)

\[ ecause a\equiv b\pmod{m}\] \[ herefore\exists p\in \mathbb{Z}:a-b=pm\] \[同理\exists q\in \mathbb{Z}:c-d=qm\] \[ egin{aligned}ac-bd&=ac-bc-bd+bc\&=(a-b)c-(b-d)c\&=pmc-qmc\&=(pc-qc)m\end{aligned}\] \[ herefore m\mid ac-bd\] \[ herefore ac\equiv bd\pmod{m}\] ## 定理12 ### 内容 \[a,b,c,d\in \mathbb{Z},m>0,d=(c,m)\] \[若ac\equiv bc\pmod{m}\] \[则a\equiv b\pmod{ rac{m}{d}}\]

证明

\[ ecause ac\equiv bc\pmod{m}\] \[ herefore m\mid(a-b)c\] \[ herefore\exists k\in \mathbb{Z}:c(a-b)=km\] \[ herefore rac{c}{d}(a-b)=k rac{m}{d}\] \[ herefore( rac{c}{d}, rac{m}{d})=1(定理5), rac{m}{d}\mid rac{c}{d}(a-b)\] \[ herefore rac{m}{d}\mid(a-b)(定理6)\] \[ herefore a\equiv b\pmod{ rac{m}{d}}\]

推论

\[a,b,c,m\in \mathbb{Z},(c,m)=1\] \[若ac\equiv bc\pmod{m}\] \[则a\equiv b\pmod{m}\]

定理13

内容

\[若\{r_1,r_2,\dots,r_m\}是一个模m的完全剩余系,且正整数a使得(a,m)=1\] \[则 orall b\in \mathbb{Z}有\{a\cdot r_1+b,a\cdot r_2+b\dots,a\cdot r_m+b\}是一个模m完全剩余系\]

证明

\[设i,j\in([1,m]\cup\N)且a\cdot r_i+b\equiv a\cdot r_j+b\pmod{m}\] \[ herefore a\cdot r_i\equiv a\cdot r_j\pmod{m}\space(定理10.2)\] \[ ecause (a,m)=1\] \[ herefore r_i\equiv r_j\pmod{m}\space(定理12.推论)\] \[又 ecause一个完全剩余系中的数两两不同余(完全剩余系的定义)\] \[ herefore i=j\] \[ herefore\{a\cdot r_1+b,a\cdot r_2+b\dots,a\cdot r_m+b\}中的数模m两两不同余\] \[ herefore\{a\cdot r_1+b,a\cdot r_2+b\dots,a\cdot r_m+b\}是一个模m完全剩余系\]

entry.title: 「Codeforces 1100C」NN and the Optical Illusion 题解
entry.content:
题目

题意

  • 一个半径为\(r\)的圆，与\(n\)个半径为\(R\)的圆相切且这\(n\)个圆分别和左右的两个圆相切
  • 已知\(n, r\),求\(R\)

思路

将外圈圆的圆心相连, 围成一个正\(n\)边形 - 从多边形截出一个\(\triangle BGA\) - \(\angle BGA=\frac{\angle BGF}{2}=\frac{180^{\circ}-\frac{360^{\circ}}{n}}{2}\) - 做\(\triangle BGA \space BG\)边上的高\(AH\) - 得到\(Rt\triangle GHA,GH=R,GA=R+r\) - \(\frac{GA}{GH}=\frac{R+r}{R}=\sec\angle BGA\) - \(R\cdot \sec\angle BGA=R+r\) - \(R\cdot(\sec\angle BGA-1)=r\) - \(R=\frac{r}{\sec\angle BGA-1}=\frac{r}{\sec(\frac{180^{\circ}-\frac{360^{\circ}}{n}}{2})-1}\)

注意事项

  1. cmath里没有\(\sec\)，可以用\(\cos\)的倒数嘛
  2. cmath里面的所有三角函数都是弧度制，要将角度\(\times\pi\div180\)

备注

绘图工具:GeoGebra Geometry ## 代码(C++)

int n;double r;read(n);std::cin >> r;double degree = 180 - (360.0 / n);degree /= 2;degree = degree / 180 * PI;double ans=r / (1 / cos(degree) - 1);std::cout.precision(7);std::cout << std::fixed << ans << std::endl;

entry.title: 「洛谷P2948」滑雪课 题解
entry.content:
题目 ## 思路 1. 首先将所有课程按结束时间排序 2. 将相同滑坡能力值的分为一类, 对于能力为\(i\)的取其中所需时间最短的\(lastmin_i\) 3. \(f(i, j)\)表示对于第\(i\)个时刻, 能力值为\(j\)或\(j\)以上时最大的滑雪次数 4. 若第\(j\)个课程开始于\(begin\)结束于\(i\), 若参加这个课程, 枚举开始时的能力值\(k, f(i, abi_j)=max\{f(begin, k) | k<=100\}\) (\(abi_j\)是第\(j\)次获得的滑雪能力), 再枚举\(abi_j\)以下的能力\(k, f(i, k)=max\{f(i, k), f(i, j)\}\) 5. 对于每一个时刻\(i\), 若滑雪, 枚举滑雪时的能力值\(k, f(i, k)=max\{f(i-lastmin_k, k)|k<=100, i-lastmin_k>=0\}\)

代码

注: 以下代码已省略头文件、read和write

class Class {public:  int begin, end, abi;}c[M];// 课程类型, 可以视作structint dp[N][M];int lastmin[M];int main () {  int n, m, t;  read(t);  read(n);  read(m);  for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {    int begin, last, abi;    read(begin);    read(last);    read(abi);    c[i].begin = begin;    c[i].end = begin + last;    c[i].abi = abi;  }  std::sort(c + 1, c + n + 1, [](Class i, Class j) {    return i.end < j.end;  });// 给课程按结束时间排序, 用到了匿名(lambda)函数, 需要开C++11  for (int i = 1; i <= 100; i++) {    lastmin[i] = inf;  }  for (int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {    int need, last;    read(need);    read(last);    lastmin[need] = std::min(lastmin[need], last);  }  memset(dp, -1, sizeof(dp));  for (int i = 0; i <= t; i++) {    dp[i][1] = 0;  }  int ans = 0;  for (int i = 1, j = 1; i <= t; i++) {// j表示下一个课程的编号    if (c[j].end == i) {      for (int k = 1; k <= 100; k++) {        dp[i][c[j].abi] = std::max(dp[i][c[j].abi], dp[c[j].begin][k]);      }      for (int k = 1; k < c[j].abi; k++) {        dp[i][k] = std::max(dp[i][k], dp[i][c[j].abi]);      }      j++;    }// 上课    for (int k = 1; k <= 100; k++) {      if (i - lastmin[k] >= 0) {        if (dp[i - lastmin[k]][k] != -1) {          dp[i][k] = std::max(dp[i][k], dp[i - lastmin[k]][k] + 1);          ans = std::max(ans, dp[i][k]);        }      }    }// 滑雪  }  write(ans), putchar('\n');  return 0;}

entry.content:
